message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting to tooltip, editor_perf, and resize_chaos

Apply consistent code formatting across three files:

tooltip.rs:
- Collapse multi-line function signature for apply_style_to_area()
- Inline short assert! message on single line

editor_perf.rs:
- Expand ternary-style if-else to multi-line block format
- Break long assert_within_budget() calls across multiple lines
  for improved readability

resize_chaos.rs:
- Expand single-line struct initializers to multi-line format
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] to unused next_u32() helper method
- Break long method chains across lines for clamp operations

No behavioral changes - purely formatting consistency enforced
by rustfmt with project conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
